# AIPrep365

> Smarter SAT prep with an AI tutor that never stops teaching.

AIPrep365 is an advanced AI-powered educational platform specifically designed for SAT preparation. Our AI tutor provides 24/7 support, instant feedback, personalized learning paths, and identifies student weak areas to maximize their test scores.

## Key Features
- **Full-Length Adaptive Tests:** Questions and practice plans adjust to the student’s performance in real time.
- **Instant Feedback:** Students get explanations and corrections right away instead of waiting.
- **Performance Tracking:** Clear progress reports show what is improving and what needs more work.
- **Weak Area Focus:** AI spots patterns and targets the exact skills hurting the score.
